final:
module dram_cell (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory <= data_in ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory ;
  end
endmodule
